kcrg-2022.text: Cedar Rapids Police have issued an Operation Quick Find: Zenej’a Renee-mae KalmoniCedar Rapids police are searching for a missing teen.  Zenej’a Renee-mae Kalmoni was last seen at 845 31st Avenue Southwest at 2:56 a.m. Sunday morning.
